star_rules.description: Detects execution of known credential theft tools targeting LSASS
star_rules.query: SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'sekurlsa' OR SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'lsadump' OR SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'mimikatz' OR (SrcProcName = 'procdump.exe' AND SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'lsass') OR (SrcProcName = 'rundll32.exe' AND SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'comsvcs' AND SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'MiniDump')

star_rules.description: Detects volume shadow copy deletion indicating ransomware activity
star_rules.query: (SrcProcName = 'vssadmin.exe' AND SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'delete shadows') OR (SrcProcName = 'wmic.exe' AND SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'shadowcopy delete') OR (SrcProcName = 'bcdedit.exe' AND SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'recoveryenabled no')

star_rules.description: Detects attempts to bypass Antimalware Scan Interface
star_rules.query: SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'AmsiUtils' OR SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'amsiInitFailed' OR SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'AmsiScanBuffer'

star_rules.description: Detects PsExec service installation for lateral movement
Detects LOLBin abuse for downloading or executing payloads
star_rules.query: SrcProcName IN ('mshta.exe', 'certutil.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'msbuild.exe', 'cmstp.exe') AND (SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'http' OR SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS 'javascript' OR SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS '-decode' OR SrcProcCmdLine ContainsCIS '-urlcache')
